stemHtml: Jetsun 1154 at FL350 over BCN VOR has a rapid depressurisation. Correct distress call?

options.a: Mayday x3, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, descending FL100, depressurisation, intend landing Barcelona.
options.b: Mayday x3, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, descending FL100, depressurisation, overhead BCN.
options.c: Mayday x3, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, depressurisation, descending FL100, overhead BCN, heading 180, 150 POB.
options.d: Mayday x3, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, passing FL340, descending FL100, depressurisation, overhead BCN.
